hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【WORLD】真主党无人机如何颠覆以色列在黎巴嫩的战略；【CRYPTO】随着人工智能股票不断攀升，比特币 ETF 最大抛售额已达 34 亿美元；【WORLD】伊朗战争实时更新：以色列似乎不再威胁袭击贝鲁特。

items.title: How Hezbollah Drones Upended Israel’s Strategy in Lebanon
items.summary: An Israeli campaign that started with high hopes has devolved into a kind of impasse, with Hezbollah looking more capable than it did when the war began.
items.title_zh: 真主党无人机如何颠覆以色列在黎巴嫩的战略
items.summary_zh: 以色列的一场原本满怀希望的战役已经陷入僵局，真主党看起来比战争开始时更有能力。

items.title: Bitcoin's biggest ETF selloff yet hits $3.4 billion as AI stocks keep climbing
items.summary: U.S. spot bitcoin funds bled cash for 11 straight sessions through Monday, the longest redemption streak since their 2024 launch, as risk dollars rotated toward an AI-led equities rally.
items.title_zh: 随着人工智能股票不断攀升，比特币 ETF 最大抛售额已达 34 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 随着风险美元转向人工智能引领的股市上涨，美国现货比特币基金截至周一连续 11 个交易日亏损，这是自 2024 年推出以来最长的赎回记录。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Israel Appears to Pull Back From Threat to Strike Beirut
items.summary: President Trump is pressing Israel not to attack the Lebanese capital. An escalation in Israel’s campaign against Hezbollah could threaten peace talks with Iran.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：以色列似乎不再威胁袭击贝鲁特
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统敦促以色列不要袭击黎巴嫩首都。以色列针对真主党的行动升级可能会威胁到与伊朗的和平谈判。

items.title: Strategy sold bitcoin in late May, and told the market in June. Here's how Polymarket bettors are fighting over when it counts.
items.summary: A $79 million market hinges not on whether Michael Saylor's firm sold bitcoin, but on whether a sale disclosed June 1 can count toward a deadline that passed May 31.
items.title_zh: Strategy在5月下旬出售了比特币，并在6月告诉市场。以下是 Polymarket 投注者在关键时刻如何争夺的。
items.summary_zh: 7900 万美元的市场并不取决于 Michael Saylor 的公司是否出售比特币，而是取决于 6 月 1 日披露的出售是否可以计入 5 月 31 日之后的截止日期。

items.title: Bitcoin slides toward $70,000 as Strategy’s BTC sale, geopolitical risks weigh on crypto
items.summary: Analysts said the size of Strategy's bitcoin sale was relatively trivial, but sent a bearish signal to the broader market.
items.title_zh: 随着Strategy出售比特币，比特币跌向7万美元，地缘政治风险打压加密货币
items.summary_zh: 分析师表示，Strategy 的比特币销售规模相对较小，但向更广泛的市场发出了看跌信号。

items.title: Greg Abel just made his first big deal as Berkshire CEO. Why Warren Buffett is happy
items.summary: Berkshire's purchase of homebuilder Taylor Morrison gives the conglomerate a larger foothold in housing and appears to have been struck at a bargain valuation.
items.title_zh: 格雷格·阿贝尔刚刚完成了他作为伯克希尔首席执行官的第一笔大交易。为什么沃伦·巴菲特很高兴
items.summary_zh: 伯克希尔哈撒韦公司收购房屋建筑商泰勒·莫里森(Taylor Morrison)，使该集团在房地产领域获得了更大的立足点，而且估值似乎很便宜。

items.title: Berkshire Hathaway buys Taylor Morrison for $6.8 billion. Buffett touts Abel’s deal-making
items.summary: The acquisition marks one of the first major strategic deals under Warren Buffett's successor Greg Abel, who took over as CEO in the beginning of 2026.
items.title_zh: 伯克希尔·哈撒韦公司以 68 亿美元收购泰勒·莫里森。巴菲特吹捧阿贝尔的交易
items.summary_zh: 此次收购是沃伦·巴菲特的继任者格雷格·阿贝尔 (Greg Abel) 领导下的首批重大战略交易之一，格雷格·阿贝尔于 2026 年初接任首席执行官。

items.title: Clashes continue in Lebanon despite Israel and Hezbollah accepting US partial ceasefire plan
items.summary: A cessation of hostilities between Israel and Hezbollah is seen as crucial to the peace process with Iran.
items.title_zh: 尽管以色列和真主党接受美国部分停火计划，黎巴嫩冲突仍在继续
items.summary_zh: 以色列和真主党之间停止敌对行动被视为对伊朗和平进程至关重要。

items.title: How Lebanon’s Best Chance to Disarm Hezbollah Failed
items.summary: Lebanon’s government has long wanted the powerful militia to give up its weapons. Before the Iran war began, there were signs of progress toward that goal.
items.title_zh: 黎巴嫩解除真主党武装的最佳机会为何失败
items.summary_zh: 黎巴嫩政府长期以来一直希望强大的民兵放弃武器。在伊朗战争开始之前，就有迹象表明这一目标已取得进展。

items.title: MoneyGram launches stablecoin on Stellar, joining rush toward digital dollar payments
items.summary: MGUSD, issued by Stripe's Bridge, will power services across MoneyGram's global network as stablecoins gain traction in cross-border payments.
items.title_zh: MoneyGram 在 Stellar 上推出稳定币，加入数字美元支付热潮
items.summary_zh: 随着稳定币在跨境支付领域获得越来越多的关注，由 Stripe's Bridge 发行的 MGUSD 将为 MoneyGram 全球网络的服务提供支持。

items.title: Mt. Gox moves 10,422 bitcoin worth $739 million to a new wallet as deadline nears
items.summary: The 04:47 UTC Bitcoin block 952,072 transaction moved coins from Mt. Gox cold storage into a freshly generated address, with a smaller 116-bitcoin slice routed to the defunct exchange's hot wallet.
items.title_zh: 随着截止日期的临近，Mt. Gox 将价值 7.39 亿美元的 10,422 比特币转移到新钱包
items.summary_zh: 世界标准时间 04:47 的比特币区块 952,072 交易将币从 Mt. Gox 冷存储转移到新生成的地址，其中较小的 116 比特币切片被路由到已不复存在的交易所的热钱包。

items.title: Bitcoin drops below $70,000 as stocks pause and Strategy's BTC sale weighs on crypto
items.summary: BTC fell 3.8% in 24 hours to below $69,960 , the lowest level in weeks, as Monday's 8-K filing disclosing Strategy's first publicized bitcoin sale continued to weigh.
items.title_zh: 随着股市暂停，Strategy 的 BTC 销售打压加密货币，比特币跌破 70,000 美元
items.summary_zh: BTC 在 24 小时内下跌 3.8%，跌破 69,960 美元，为数周以来的最低水平，周一 8-K 文件披露的 Strategy 首次公开的比特币销售继续承压。

items.title: Saylor's Strategy sold bitcoin for the first time since 2022. These firms are still buying
items.summary: With Strategy breaking its accumulation streak and many peers stepping aside, the list of active digital asset treasuries has narrowed considerably.
items.title_zh: Saylor's Strategy 自 2022 年以来首次出售比特币。这些公司仍在购买
items.summary_zh: 随着Strategy打破了其积累势头，许多同行纷纷退出，活跃的数字资产国债名单已大幅缩小。

items.title: It's not 2022 anymore: What Strategy's first bitcoin sale can (and can't) tell us about this one
items.summary: Michael Saylor's Strategy has evolved into a far more complex bitcoin-finance machine since it last sold BTC three and half years ago.
items.title_zh: 现在已经不是 2022 年了：Strategy 的第一次比特币销售可以（或不能）告诉我们关于这个的什么信息
items.summary_zh: 自从三年半前上次出售比特币以来，迈克尔·塞勒的策略已经发展成为一个更加复杂的比特币金融机器。

items.title: Spot bitcoin ETFs extend negative streak, following $2.4 billion monthly outflows in May
items.summary: Dampened hopes for an improved macroeconomic environment have led institutions to move from crypto ETFs to AI stocks, an analyst said.
items.title_zh: 继 5 月份每月流出 24 亿美元之后，现货比特币 ETF 延续负值趋势
items.summary_zh: 一位分析师表示，对宏观经济环境改善的希望减弱，导致机构从加密 ETF 转向人工智能股票。

items.title: Grayscale sets 0.29% fee for its Hyperliquid ETF, undercutting Bitwise and 21Shares
items.summary: Grayscale is set to launch its own Hyperliquid exchange-traded fund as soon as this week, setting a sponsor fee of 0.29%.
items.title_zh: Grayscale为其Hyperliquid ETF设定0.29%的费用，低于Bitwise和21Shares
items.summary_zh: Grayscale 最快将于本周推出自己的 Hyperliquid 交易所交易基金，保荐费设定为 0.29%。

items.title: Strategy bitcoin sale timing throws wrench into $20 million Polymarket pool
items.summary: A Polymarket pool asking whether Strategy would sell any of its bitcoin before May 31 had drawn more than $20 million in trading volume.
items.title_zh: 策略比特币销售时机对 2000 万美元的 Polymarket 池造成影响
items.summary_zh: Polymarket 池询问 Strategy 是否会在 5 月 31 日之前出售其任何比特币，该池的交易量已超过 2000 万美元。

items.title: Two months, $2.6 billion: How NASA ETF turned SpaceX IPO access into a hot retail trade
items.summary: With Elon Musk's SpaceX IPO ahead, retail investors are rushing into space-themed ETFs including NASA which offers direct access to the rocket company.
items.title_zh: 两个月，26 亿美元：NASA ETF 如何将 SpaceX IPO 变成热门零售交易
items.summary_zh: 随着埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) SpaceX 首次公开募股 (IPO) 的临近，散户投资者纷纷涌入太空主题 ETF，其中包括 NASA，后者提供直接投资这家火箭公司的机会。

items.title: After an Agonizing Week of Threats, Kyiv Is Finally Bombarded by Russia
items.summary: Moscow’s repeated warnings of a major strike, combined with the delay before it happened, seemed intended to inflict a psychological toll on the Ukrainian capital.
items.title_zh: 经过一周令人痛苦的威胁后，基辅终于遭到俄罗斯的轰炸
items.summary_zh: 莫斯科一再发出重大罢工的警告，再加上罢工发生前的拖延，似乎是为了给乌克兰首都造成心理打击。

items.title: Alberta’s Movement to Separate from Canada Gets Its Moment
items.summary: In October, Albertans will get to say if they want to stay in Canada, or hold a referendum to leave. Will it settle the matter, or deepen the rift?
items.title_zh: 艾伯塔省脱离加拿大的运动迎来了时机
items.summary_zh: 十月，阿尔伯塔人将决定是否想留在加拿大，或者举行公投离开。它会解决问题，还是加深裂痕？

items.title: Crypto investment firm Keyrock is acquiring bankrupt lender Blockfills
items.summary: The Brussels-based digital asset services firm plans to purchase BlockFills months after the Chicago-based company filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy, if a court approves.
items.title_zh: 加密货币投资公司 Keyrock 正在收购破产贷款机构 Blockfills
items.summary_zh: 如果法院批准，这家总部位于布鲁塞尔的数字资产服务公司计划在这家总部位于芝加哥的公司根据美国破产法第 11 章申请破产几个月后收购 BlockFills。

items.title: Unable to recover from roughly $50 million hack, Radiant Capital is winding down
items.summary: Radiant Capital said it hasn't been able to recover a meaningful amount of funds or raise new capital since the 2024 exploit.
items.title_zh: Radiant Capital 无法从大约 5000 万美元的黑客攻击中恢复过来，即将倒闭
items.summary_zh: Radiant Capital 表示，自 2024 年漏洞利用以来，它一直无法收回大量资金或筹集新资金。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #21.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：LAB (LAB)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 21。

items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 88。

items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 10。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #57.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：人性 (H)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 57。

items.title: How Endava builds an agentic organization with Codex
items.summary: Learn how Endava uses Codex to build an agentic organization, accelerating software delivery and reducing requirements analysis from weeks to hours.
items.title_zh: Endava 如何利用 Codex 建立代理组织
items.summary_zh: 了解 Endava 如何使用 Codex 构建代理组织、加速软件交付并将需求分析从数周缩短至数小时。

items.title: Specialization Beats Scale: A Strategic Variable Most AI Procurement Decisions Overlook
items.title_zh: 专业化战胜规模：大多数人工智能采购决策忽视的战略变量

items.title: Technology usually creates jobs for young, skilled workers. Will AI do the same?
items.summary: A new study of the postwar U.S. shows which kinds of workers historically filled new tech-enabled jobs.
items.title_zh: 技术通常会为年轻的技术工人创造就业机会。人工智能也会这么做吗？
items.summary_zh: 一项针对战后美国的新研究显示了历史上哪些类型的工人担任了新技术支持的工作。

items.title: Games people — and machines — play: Untangling strategic reasoning to advance AI
items.summary: Assistant Professor Gabriele Farina mines the foundations of decision-making in complex multi-agent scenarios.
items.title_zh: 人和机器玩的游戏：理清战略推理以推进人工智能
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Gabriele Farina 挖掘复杂多智能体场景中决策的基础。

items.title: Nvidia, Meta and SLB rank among top companies in adopting AI, new study says
items.summary: The AI-Driven Enterprise Institute released new research that breaks down the degree to which S&P 500 companies are adopting AI compared with their peers.
items.title_zh: 新研究表明，Nvidia、Meta 和 SLB 在采用人工智能方面名列前茅
items.summary_zh: 人工智能驱动企业研究所发布了一项新研究，详细分析了标准普尔 500 强公司与同行相比采用人工智能的程度。

items.title: Australian ex-minister launches crowd-funded inquiry into Aukus submarine deal
items.summary: Inquiry will look at whether Australia will receive the submarines and whether it will make the country safer.
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚前部长对奥库斯潜艇交易发起众筹调查
items.summary_zh: 调查将关注澳大利亚是否会接收这些潜艇以及这是否会让该国更加安全。

items.title: XRP falls 4% below $1.30 as bitcoin-led market weakness pulls down majors
items.summary: XRP hit fresh 15-week lows after losing a key support zone, with exchange outflows failing to offset persistent selling pressure.
items.title_zh: 由于比特币主导的市场疲软拖累主要货币，XRP 跌至 1.30 美元下方 4%
items.summary_zh: XRP 在失去关键支撑区域后触及 15 周新低，资金外流未能抵消持续的抛售压力。

items.title: Crypto funds suffer second-largest outflows of 2026 while XRP and HYPE attract inflows
items.summary: Investors pulled $1.67 billion from digital asset investment products last week, with bitcoin funds posting their largest weekly outflow of the year, according to a recent report from CoinShares.
items.title_zh: 加密货币基金遭受 2026 年第二大资金流出，而 XRP 和 HYPE 则吸引资金流入
items.summary_zh: 根据 CoinShares 最近的一份报告，投资者上周从数字资产投资产品中撤资 16.7 亿美元，比特币基金创下了今年最大的单周流出量。

items.title: Mt. Gox moves $739 million worth of bitcoin to two addresses: Arkham
items.summary: Mt. Gox transferred a combined 10,306 BTC to an unmarked address and its hot wallet early Tuesday, according to Arkham.
items.title_zh: Mt. Gox 将价值 7.39 亿美元的比特币转移到两个地址：Arkham
items.summary_zh: 据 Arkham 称，Mt. Gox 周二早些时候将总计 10,306 BTC 转移到一个未标记的地址及其热钱包。

items.title: TON revives Gram token brand as Telegram CEO Durov says network is ‘returning to roots’
items.summary: The Gram rebrand follows network upgrades, fee cuts, and Telegram's push for a larger role in TON governance.
items.title_zh: Telegram 首席执行官 Durov 表示网络“回归根源”，TON 重振 Gram 代币品牌
items.summary_zh: Gram 品牌重塑是在网络升级、费用削减以及 Telegram 推动在 TON 治理中发挥更大作用之后进行的。

items.title: Bitmine acquires 26,497 ETH as it targets a slower approach to 5% of Ethereum’s total supply
items.summary: Bitmine Chairman Tom Lee said the company would reach its 5% acquisition target of Ethereum's total supply "sometime in 2026."
items.title_zh: Bitmine 收购了 26,497 ETH，目标是缓慢接近以太坊总供应量的 5%
items.summary_zh: Bitmine 董事长 Tom Lee 表示，该公司将在“2026 年的某个时候”实现以太坊总供应量 5% 的收购目标。

items.title: Codex is becoming a productivity tool for everyone
items.summary: The Next Era of Knowledge Work report explores how Codex is transforming productivity through AI-powered research, data analysis, workflow automation, and content creation.
items.title_zh: Codex 正在成为每个人的生产力工具
items.summary_zh: 知识工作的下一个时代报告探讨了 Codex 如何通过人工智能驱动的研究、数据分析、工作流程自动化和内容创建来改变生产力。

items.title: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now available on AWS
items.summary: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now generally available on AWS, giving enterprises a new path to build with OpenAI through the AWS environments, controls, and procurement workflows they already use. Customers can get started with OpenAI on AWS and move faster from evaluation
items.title_zh: OpenAI 前沿模型和 Codex 现已在 AWS 上提供
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 前沿模型和 Codex 现已在 AWS 上普遍提供，为企业提供了一条通过他们已使用的 AWS 环境、控制和采购工作流程使用 OpenAI 进行构建的新途径。客户可以开始使用 AWS 上的 OpenAI 并更快地完成评估

items.title: Strengthening societal resilience with Rosalind Biodefense
items.summary: OpenAI launches Rosalind Biodefense, expanding trusted access to GPT-Rosalind for vetted developers and U.S. government partners advancing biodefense, public health, and pandemic preparedness through frontier AI.
items.title_zh: 通过 Rosalind Biodefense 增强社会复原力

items.summary: OpenAI shares guidance on third-party AI evaluations, covering how to assess model capabilities, safeguards, and validity for frontier systems.

items.summary_zh: 我们一直很忙！以下是 I/O 2026 上最重要的公告、发布和演示的摘要。

items.title: How AI Mode is changing the way people search in the U.S.
items.summary: One year after launch, see how AI Mode’s users are shifting from keywords to natural language queries.

items.summary_zh: 发布一年后，看看 AI 模式的用户如何从关键字转向自然语言查询。

items.title: Building AI models that understand chemical principles
items.summary: Connor Coley works at the interface of chemistry and machine learning, to discover and design new drug compounds.
items.title_zh: 构建理解化学原理的人工智能模型
items.summary_zh: Connor Coley 致力于化学和机器学习的结合，发现和设计新的药物化合物。

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: Individual traders drove Kalshi’s rise. Now, it’s going for Wall Street
items.summary: In a series of moves in 2026, the prediction market platform in the U.S. is working to make its event contracts more attractive to institutional trading.
items.title_zh: 个体交易员推动了卡尔希的上涨。现在，它正走向华尔街
items.summary_zh: 在 2026 年的一系列举措中，美国预测市场平台正在努力使其事件合约对机构交易更具吸引力。

items.title: Rubio odds for GOP 2028 nominee close to overtaking Vance on Kalshi
items.summary: Vice President Vance has seen his odds slip since the start of the year, as the secretary of State's chances have been buoyed by international conflicts.
items.title_zh: 卢比奥获得共和党 2028 年提名的可能性接近超越万斯
items.summary_zh: 自今年年初以来，副总统万斯的胜算一直在下降，因为国际冲突增加了国务卿的机会。

items.title: 'Disrupted or dead': AI is crushing a generation of startups built before ChatGPT
items.summary: The AI boom that has funneled more than $250 billion into OpenAI and Anthropic has left hundreds of startups built before ChatGPT's arrival in 2022 stranded.
items.title_zh: “要么颠覆，要么消亡”：人工智能正在摧毁 ChatGPT 之前建立的一代初创公司
items.summary_zh: 人工智能热潮为 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 注入了超过 2500 亿美元，这使得在 2022 年 ChatGPT 到来之前建立的数百家初创公司陷入困境。

items.title: Nvidia picks Unitree for humanoid robot platform as Chinese startup eyes IPO
items.summary: The U.S. chipmaker's first publicly available humanoid robotics system will use humanoids from Chinese startup Unitree.
items.title_zh: 中国初创公司考虑首次公开募股，英伟达选择 Unitree 作为人形机器人平台
items.summary_zh: 这家美国芯片制造商的第一个公开的人形机器人系统将使用中国初创公司 Unitree 的人形机器人。

items.title: China’s factory activity beats forecasts in May, private survey shows, despite softer official data
items.summary: China’s manufacturing activity expanded faster than expected in May, according to a private survey released Monday, although growth slowed from April.
items.title_zh: 私人调查显示，尽管官方数据疲软，中国 5 月份工厂活动仍超出预期
items.summary_zh: 周一发布的一项私人调查显示，中国 5 月份制造业活动扩张速度快于预期，但增速较 4 月份有所放缓。

items.title: Former Barclays CEO Jes Staley agrees to July 23 interview about Jeffrey Epstein by Oversight panel
items.summary: Microsoft co-founder Bill Gates is scheduled to be interviewed about his relationship to the sex offender Jeffrey Epstein in June.
items.title_zh: 巴克莱银行前首席执行官 Jes Staley 同意 7 月 23 日接受监督小组关于杰弗里·爱泼斯坦 (Jeffrey Epstein) 的采访
items.summary_zh: 微软联合创始人比尔盖茨计划于六月接受采访，谈论他与性犯罪者杰弗里爱泼斯坦的关系。

items.title: Massive Russian attack on cities across Ukraine kills at least 16 people
items.summary: An eight-year-old boy and a woman pulled from the rubble of an apartment block are among those killed, officials say.

items.summary_zh: 官员称，遇难者包括从公寓楼废墟中救出的一名八岁男孩和一名妇女。

items.title: Two people shot dead amid Kenya protests against US Ebola quarantine centre plan
items.summary: The US plan has sparked public anger and led to demonstrations near the site of the proposed treatment facility.

items.summary_zh: 美国的计划引发了公众的愤怒，并导致拟建治疗设施附近发生示威活动。

items.title: Why Myanmar president's India visit is being closely watched
items.summary: Myanmar is seeking to broaden diplomatic engagement after years of international criticism and isolation.
items.title_zh: 缅甸总统印度之行为何受到密切关注
items.summary_zh: 经过多年的国际批评和孤立，缅甸正在寻求扩大外交接触。

items.summary: The leader of Denmark's Social Democratic Party is forming a centre-left coalition minority government, giving her a third term as prime minister.
items.title_zh: 丹麦梅特·弗雷德里克森经过数月谈判组建政府
items.summary_zh: 丹麦社会民主党领导人正在组建一个中左翼联合少数政府，这将让她第三次担任首相。

items.title: Trump administration will abide by ruling halting $1.8bn 'anti-weaponisation' fund
items.summary: The justice department says it "disagrees strongly" with a court decision to halt the establishment of the fund.

items.summary_zh: 司法部表示“强烈反对”法院停止设立该基金的决定。

items.title: China goes after 'ghost kitchens' to rein in cut-throat food delivery apps
items.summary: The thousands of "ghost kitchens" - online shops that don't actually exist - have spooked Chinese consumers.
items.title_zh: 中国打击“幽灵厨房”以遏制残酷的送餐应用
items.summary_zh: 数以千计的“幽灵厨房”——实际上并不存在的网上商店——让中国消费者感到恐慌。

items.title: Missing lab worker found dead in New Mexico nearly a year after disappearing
items.summary: Melissa Casias' case was part of debunked speculations about recent deaths and disappearances in the US scientific community.

items.title: AI giant Anthropic plans to sell shares in US as valuation nears $1tn
items.summary: The AI company behind Claude is set to offer the public the chance to buy and sell shares in the firm later this year.

items.summary_zh: 克劳德背后的人工智能公司将于今年晚些时候向公众提供买卖该公司股票的机会。

items.title: U.S. Was Asked to Blacklist Colombian Cartel Gold. It Was Also Buying It.

items.summary_zh: 哥伦比亚国防部长提出的制裁请求显示了非法黄金供应链两端的失败。

items.title: The New Zealand Parakeet Pair That Are Saving Their Species
items.summary: There are about 450 orange-fronted parakeets left in the world. Super breeders Nacho and Trixie are doing their best to bolster the population.
items.title_zh: 新西兰鹦鹉对正在拯救自己的物种
items.summary_zh: 世界上仅存约 450 只橙额鹦鹉。超级饲养员纳乔和特里克西正在尽最大努力增加种群数量。

items.title: A Stray Dog Became a Cultural Symbol in Brazil. Now, Mexico Is Claiming It.
items.summary: To Brazilians, the ubiquitous caramel-colored mutts are a national icon. But a Mexican state has adopted them as its own homegrown symbol.
items.title_zh: 流浪狗成为巴西的文化象征。现在，墨西哥声称拥有主权。
items.summary_zh: 对于巴西人来说，无处不在的焦糖色杂种狗是国家的象征。但墨西哥州已将它们作为自己本土的象征。

items.title: An Industrial Gem in Venezuela Now Embodies the Country’s Decay

items.title: UK Releases More Files About Mandelson, Ex-Diplomat With Ties to Epstein
items.summary: Peter Mandelson, who was fired over his links to Jeffrey Epstein, made the claim in a letter among more than a thousand pages of documents released on Monday.

items.summary_zh: 因与杰弗里·爱泼斯坦（Jeffrey Epstein）有联系而被解雇的彼得·曼德尔森（Peter Mandelson）在周一公布的一千多页文件中的一封信中提出了这一说法。

items.title: Justin Solomon appointed associate dean of engineering education
items.summary: MIT faculty member in electrical engineering and computer science to focus on innovation in engineering education and new pedagogical approaches.

items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院电气工程和计算机科学教员，专注于工程教育和新教学方法的创新。

items.title: Study: Firms often use automation to control certain workers’ wages
items.summary: MIT economists found US companies tend to target employees earning a “wage premium,” which increases inequality but not necessarily productivity.
